notableEvents.label: Manny Machado GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Manny Machado grounds into a double play, pitcher Landen Roupp to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Casey Schmitt. Fernando Tatis Jr. out at 2nd. Manny Machado out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Andujar pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Andujar grounds out, third baseman Matt Chapman to first baseman Casey Schmitt.

notableEvents.label: Rafael Devers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rafael Devers grounds into a double play, second baseman Jake Cronenworth to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Willy Adames out at 2nd. Rafael Devers out at 1st.
